description: A benefits recipient needs to report the birth of a new child, which may affect their benefit amount.

nodes.task_description: Identify the citizen and their active benefits case.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the correct case file.

nodes.task_description: Add the new child to the household composition in the case file.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accurately adds the new dependent's information.

nodes.task_description: Trigger a recalculation of benefits based on the new household size.

expected_outcome.expected: The system recalculates and increases the benefit amount.
